specializations: Cellulose ether texture modifiers and rheology solutions
Natural rheology modifiers for diverse pH ranges
Sustainable texture ingredients with clean profiles
ISCC PLUS certified ingredients for responsible sourcing
product_highlights: Bermocoll™ cellulose ether — versatile thickening and texture modification across pH ranges
Amaze™ biopolymer film former — sustainable, naturally derived synthetic film former alternative
Specialty rheology modifiers for stable emulsions and gels
ISCC PLUS certified ingredients for sustainability-focused brands
notes: Nouryon's personal care division offers a range of sustainable texture-modifying ingredients based on cellulose chemistry and biopolymers. Their Bermocoll™ cellulose ether range provides excellent thickening, film-forming, and texture-modifying performance across a wide range of pH values and formulation types. Nouryon's Amaze™ biopolymer film former is a sustainable, naturally derived alternative to synthetic film formers, delivering excellent hold and texture with a clean ingredient profile.
